shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Projectile sheet supports launch, travel, and reflected travel readability.
Travel speed grounds to the GDD fire value of 250 px per second.
differences: This file carries the fire attribute colorway with a round core and ember tail.
Flame perimeter oscillates across 6 frames while preserving a 40x40 bounding box.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground projectile readability against the academy hall.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground the 40x40 fire projectile size and 250 px per second speed.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/obstacles_fire_spell_projectile_6f_12fps.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under obstacles_fire_spell_projectile_6f_12fps.
runtime_notes: Create a 6-column TextureAtlasLayout and loop it during projectile flight.
Move the projectile by Transform translation with no physics engine dependency.
Flip the x velocity and swap to the reflected tint only through material or palette-safe frame reuse.

context.usage: Used for launch forecast, travel, and reflected hit beats during fire-attribute attacks.

shape.silhouette: Round fire orb with a bright core, two flame petals, and a short ember trail.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 240x40 px with 6 frames.
Projectile core stays inside a 40x40 bounding box in every frame.
Fire body uses #FF4500 and #FF8C00 while the reflected rim reserves #00FFFF only for the edge accent.
